title: Chuck Truett
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Chuck Truett''' is an author who wrote for the [[West End Games]] game line [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]. He has written a variety of Sources and Adventures such as ''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races, Second Edition]]'', ''[[The Abduction of Crying Dawn Singer]]'', ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'' and ''[[The Black Sphere]]''.

==Star Wars bibliography==
*''[[The Abduction of Crying Dawn Singer]]''. [[1992]]
*{{Journal|1|Stranded}}. [[1994]]
*[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races'', Second Edition]]. [[1994]]
*''[[A Necessary Evil]]'' in ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'' [[1994]]
*''[[The Black Sphere]]'' in [[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']]. [[1997]]
